content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Pre-market shows broad weakness — Nifty -0.85%, Bank Nifty -0.86%, Auto -1.41% — with VIX at 16.84 reflecting elevated risk. However, US closed strong (Nasdaq +1.71%) and pre-market pops in defensives (FMCG, IT, capital goods on earnings) suggest sector rotation rather than wholesale risk-off. Pre-market data is unreliable for execution; first 15-30 min of cash session will define direction.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1073.10,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +9.8% with SL already at 1073 (locks +9.1% gain). Pre-market +3.77% to 1091 on bullish Q4 (PAT +19%, brokerage upgrades to 1350). Current SL 1073 sits ~1.6% below CMP — within the 1% trail-gap discipline floor. Keeping SL at 1073, original target 1135 still reasonable. No-op MODIFY — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -0.6%, SL 121 intact. Gold ETF as macro hedge; geopolitical tensions support thesis. No trail needed at marginal loss."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.2%, SL 820 at breakeven (entry). FMCG rotation alive (DABUR +3.77%, Marico made ATH 843 May-6). Keeping SL at entry — under 1% trail-gap to CMP 829 if I raise it, so leave alone."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1352.00,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +9.3%, SL already trailed to 1352 (locks +7.4%). Pre-market +6.44% on Q4 beat. SL is ~1.7% below CMP 1375 — at the 1% trail-gap floor. No further tightening; switching to HOLD effectively."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -0.7%, SL 3000 about 1.7% below CMP 3051. Defence sector thesis intact with HAL results May 13 catalyst. SL respect — let it work."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.8%, SL 820 = breakeven+entry. CMP 836, SL 820 = 1.9% gap — within tolerance. No change — no-op MODIFY, switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -1.4%, SL 1465 intact. Q4 PAT +37%, BBs expanded, pre-market +1.77%. SL ~0.2% below CMP 1476 — already tight, leave alone (do not loosen). Note: SL is now very close to CMP; if it stops out, accept it."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -0.2%, SL 1580 intact (2.3% below CMP 1606). Research flags neutral — post-results underperformance, SMP changes. Thesis weakening but no break yet; respect SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -0.3%, SL 2755 intact (~0.9% below CMP 2780). Q4 strong, FY26 PAT +47%, capex announcement. Let SL work."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -1.1%, SL 9020 intact (~0.7% below CMP 9083). Pre-market 3.3x volume, Q4 record revenue +27%, dividend Rs 47. SL very tight to CMP now; accept SL outcome if hit."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -1.6%, SL 1955 intact (~1.7% below CMP 1989). Q4 solid ex-exceptional, defense orders +46%. Respect SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -1.8%, SL 354 intact (~2.5% below CMP 362). Q4 PAT +30.6%, Macquarie target 415. Banking weak today but ABCAPITAL not pure bank — let position breathe to SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -1.5%, SL 10440 intact (~2.5% below CMP 10711). Q4 PAT +34%, buyback Rs 12000, dividend Rs 150. Pre-market +1%. Auto sector weak today; SL appropriately wide for a high-conviction event-trade. Respect SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -0.4%, SL 472 intact (~3% below CMP 487). Pre-market +3.77% on Q4 beat. Raised FY27 guidance. Thesis improving; SL has room."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +0.5%, SL 1190 intact (~3% below CMP 1228). Research flags Kotak Sell at 800 target and Q4 EBITDA miss risk — but Q4 not yet out per data (research says 'pending in May'). Rule 11 binary-event flag: results in May, possibly within 3 sessions. Given small position size (~2% of book) and intact SL, hold but flag for exit if results land bearish."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.3,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Pending MIS BUY from a prior session (placed 7462min ago, ~5 days old). This is stale and should be CANCELLED — MIS limit orders that haven't filled across sessions are pure noise. However, the schema does not include a CANCEL action; leaving as NO_ACTION since the order will auto-expire on MIS day-end. Flag for cleanup."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1073.10,
      "reasoning": "SL at 1073 locks +9% gain; trail-gap to CMP 1091 ~1.6%. Adequate; let winner run toward 1135."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive macro hedge, marginal loss, SL intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry breakeven; FMCG momentum confirms thesis."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1352.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed; locks +7.4%. Trail-gap floor respected."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 3000.00,
      "reasoning": "Defence thesis intact; SL has ~1.7% breathing room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven+entry; Q4 record revenue confirms thesis."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1465.00,
      "reasoning": "SL respect; do not loosen on Q4 strength — wait for cash session."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1580.00,
      "reasoning": "Thesis weakening per research; SL will handle exit if breaks down."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2755.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 strong; SL near support."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 9020.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 record print; SL tight but appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1955.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 solid ex-exceptional; respect SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 354.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +30.6%, ATH May-6; let position breathe through BFSI weakness."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 10440.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 + buyback + dividend trifecta; SL has room for auto sector chop."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 472.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 +16% PAT, raised guidance, pre-market +3.77%. SL has room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1190.00,
      "reasoning": "Small position; respect SL through potential Q4 binary."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Pre-market is unreliable for execution. THERMAX +11.84%, NUVAMA +10.65%, CRAFTSMAN 15x volume are all reactive moves to Q4 results — chasing pre-market gaps at session open is a recipe for fading. Will reassess each in next batch with live cash data. CANDIDATES TO WATCH for fresh entry post-9:30 cash data: (a) DABUR — already held, would NOT add (cluster rule, MARICO + DABUR is FMCG cluster); (b) THERMAX — capital goods, ~38% 1-month run, would only enter on consolidation, not gap chase; (c) NBCC — pre-market +3.91%, PSU construction, capex theme; (d) TITAN — pre-market +4.68%, consumer discretionary, no Q4 binary flagged; (e) PERSISTENT/INFY — IT defensive but COFORGE already gives IT exposure (cluster). HCLTECH near 52w low is a contrarian thesis worth checking later. EXPLICIT REJECTS THIS CYCLE: BERGEPAINT (Rule 11 — Q4 results May 12, binary in 1 session, NO new entry); LAURUSLABS add (already held, Kotak Sell + Q4 binary pending); CRAFTSMAN (15x volume unexplained — wait for catalyst clarity, do not chase); FINCABLES (cluster — POLYCAB already held in cables/capital goods).",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 65%, cash 35% (~₹351K). 15 holdings — book is broad and concentration is fine. Sectors: BFSI (PNBHOUSING + CAMS + ABCAPITAL ~17%), FMCG (MARICO + DABUR ~5%), IT (COFORGE ~4%), Chem (PIDILITIND + SRF ~7%), Pharma (WOCKPHARMA + LAURUSLABS ~5%), Cap goods (POLYCAB + GRSE ~6%), Auto (BAJAJ-AUTO + BHARATFORG ~9%), Gold ETF (~5%). No sector breach, no cluster breach. PERFORMANCE CONTEXT IS A CONCERN: 12% win rate, profit factor 0.5x, cumulative -₹1,859 across 43 trades. Today's pre-market shows several Q4 winners in the held book pushing into green — let winners work, do not panic-trim. Will revisit new entries in afternoon batch after live cash data. HFCL pending order (5 days old) is system noise; if it surfaces again will explicitly cancel."
}
